question:
Will Barnsley FC vs. York City FC end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 1, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.thefa.com/competitions/thefacup

evidences.title: Match Preview | Barnsley FC (A) | Saturday 1st November | York City Football Club
evidences.content: York City Football Club York City Football Club # Match Preview | Barnsley FC (A) | Saturday 1st November York City will be looking to cause an upset in the Emirates FA Cup this weekend when we make the journey to Oakwell for the first time in 10 years to face Barnsley FC, with kick-off at 3 pm. City were held at FC Halifax Town last weekend, where a dominant performance could only see the Minstermen leave with a single point. Ollie Pearce was the man to score once more as his 85th-minute goal snatched the win off the Shaymen. Barnsley, however, suffered defeat to local rivals Rotherham at Oakwell last weekend when a single Kian Spence goal was enough to ensure the Reds went five league games without a victory. [...] We would also like to remind supporters travelling by coach that there is a strict ‘no alcohol’ policy on board. ##### KEEP UPDATED The best way to follow the game is in person. There will also be… York City is proud of our rich history and giant killing success for over a century. We are York! © York City Football Club Ltd. All Rights Reserved. | Company Reg No: 04689338 | Registered in England & Wales | Privacy Policy | Terms & Conditions | Disallow non-essential...

evidences.title: [PDF] COMPETITION RULES 2025-26 - The FA
evidences.content: (f) Where play is not possible owing to causes beyond the control of either Team, the Match Officials shall be entitled to their travelling expenses. In the event of a Match Official attending a tie cancelled or postponed without their knowledge, the home Team will be required to pay one half of the usual fee. (g) The scale of fees to be paid to Match Officials are as set out in the Fees Tariff. These Fees are subject to an annual review by the Association. [...] Team shall be permitted to compete for another Team in the current playing season. (f) Kick off times shall be between 10.00am and 2.00pm unless mutually agreed otherwise. Should there be a dispute over the kick off time, the Association shall be the sole arbiter. Consideration should be given for Teams having to travel a distance. (g) A Team may at its discretion and in accordance with the Laws of the Game use up to five substitute players who may be selected from up to five nominated to the Referee prior to the commencement of the tie. A player who has been substituted then becomes a substitute and may replace another player at any time subject to the substitution being carried out in accordance with Law 3 of the Laws...

evidences.title: Barnsley FC and York City both hope to build on signs of progress
evidences.content: “The plan now is to get a win (on Tuesday). It will be very different but whoever we’re playing we need to have the right mindset” Meanwhile manager Stuart Maynard thinks his York City team is starting to come together ahead of a big test at home to a Boreham Wood side unbeaten in their last 15 games. "I think you're starting to see an identity and to see it more fluent, in and out of possession and with our press," said Maynard, appointed in late August. "We haven't had a pre-season and it doesn't happen overnight. "We hadn't had much contact time on the training field but the last two weeks has given us time to really hammer in the detail." York have no fresh injuries. ## Sign up to our Team Talk newsletter ### Thank you for signing up! [...] They stopped the bleeding of four straight defeats with a 2-2 draw at Michael Duff’s Wycombe Wanderers the weekend before last, and twice came from behind to take another from high-flying Bradford City. "I was umming and aahing in the last two of three minutes when they were getting corners, (thinking) do I put Robbo (defender Marc Roberts) on and go five at the back for the last couple of minutes,” said Hourihame. GAMBLE: Barnsley coach...

evidences.title: Barnsley FC facing mini injury crisis, but Darrell Clarke pledges to 'patch up' Reds for key League One clash
evidences.content: Clarke, whose side had provided themselves with an inkling of hope following three successive wins prior to Tuesday, said: "We are having that spell now where injuries and suspensions are catching up with us a little bit, but we don’t want to become victims and have got to patch ourselves up and get a team out there on Saturday which is ready to respond. Barnsley defender Josh Earl. Picture: Tony Johnson. "Charlton is a tough away place to come. It's an even tougher one when you are on the back of four games in 10 days with three away games. It was always going to be a difficult night for us, but the boys put their bodies on the line. "There were boys playing with strains and we picked up one or two more injuries, so it's one we don’t have to over-analyse. [...] "We were disappointed, but have to focus and get the bodies right for the next one. “They (Charlton) saw out the game well and you could see they have got a decent squad and a good run at the minute, but there’s plenty of games to go in the last quarter of the season to try and pick up as many wins as we can.” A potential absence for Earl would leave Clarke without a recognised left-sided centre-half for the weekend. Rel...

evidences.title: Law 7 - The Duration of the Match - The FA
evidences.content: Players are entitled to an interval at half-time, not exceeding 15 minutes; a short drinks break (which should not exceed one minute) is permitted at the interval of half-time in extra time. Competition rules must state the duration of the half-time interval and it may be altered only with the referee’s permission. 3. Allowance for time lost The referee must not compensate for a timekeeping error during the first half by changing the length of the second half. 4. Penalty kick If a penalty kick has to be taken or retaken, the half is extended until the penalty kick is completed. 5. Abandoned match An abandoned match is replayed unless the competition rules or organisers determine otherwise. ## Useful Resources The FA ## The FA Handbook The FA ## Law 14: The Penalty Kick The FA [...] The FA Manchester City seal FA Cup glory FA Cup Final stats: Chelsea v Manchester City 2024-28 women's and girls' strategy released Women's and girls' strategy launch explained PGMOL appointments policy Football & Me: South Asian Heritage Month All Together - UK FIFA Women's World Cup 2035 bid EDI Calendar 2025-26 FULL-TIME offers you an easy way to manage your football leagues online. evidences.title: Barnsley FC vs York City | Emirates FA Cup | Match & Ticket Details | York City Football Club
evidences.content: York City Football Club York City Football Club # Barnsley FC vs York City | Emirates FA Cup | Match & Ticket Details Match and ticket details have been confirmed for our Emirates FA Cup First Round tie away at Barnsley. The fixture will take place on Saturday, 1st November (3pm kick-off) at Oakwell. We have been handed an initial allocation of 2,000 tickets and away fans will be housed in the North Stand for the game. ##### TICKETS City supporters will be able to purchase tickets online HERE from Tuesday 21st October at 10am. The link will go live at that time. We strongly advise all supporters to purchase in advance. [...] ##### MATCH DETAILS The winner of the tie will earn a place in the Emirates FA Cup Second Round. Should the match be drawn after 90 minutes, we will enter an additional 30 minutes of extra time. Failing that, the tie will be decided by a penalty shootout. ##### TRAVEL WITH YORK PULLMAN York Pullman will be running a bus to the fixture. Departure from Memorial Gardens in York city centre will be 12pm, with collection in Acomb 10 minutes later. Payments for travel need to be made in advance, with no cash being take on the day of travel. To book a place on the...

evidences.content: York City Football Club York City Football Club # York City 2024/25 Vanarama National League fixtures revealed York City will open up the 2024/25 Vanarama National League season away to Essex-based side Southend United. Back-to-back home games then follow for City, hosting newbies Tamworth and Greater Manchester side Rochdale at the LNER Community Stadium. A trip to recently relegated Sutton United also slots into August before a Bank Holiday Monday at home against National League North play-off winners Boston United. A Yorkshire Derby awaits in Calderdale this October. York will be travelling to The Shay to face FC Halifax Town on Saturday, October 26th. November sees Hartlepool United visit the city on Saturday, November 9th. [...] City will host Southend United at home prior to Christmas Day before travelling west to Oldham Athletic’s Boundary Park on Boxing Day. The Minstermen entertain Gateshead at home to conclude our festive fixtures on January 1st, 2025. FC Halifax Town visit North Yorkshire for the reverse tie in the Yorkshire Derby on Saturday, February 22nd.
